summary: Visual redesign testing of Reservation Calendar page completed. All 10 requested features verified and working correctly. The calendar displays Turkish formatting, proper color schemes, and all UI elements are functioning.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: 'Rezervasyonlar' tab button with orange color (bg-orange-500) - line 1247
VERIFIED: Navigation arrows (prev/next) working correctly - data-testid nav-prev-btn, nav-next-btn
VERIFIED: 'Tarihe git' button working - navigates to today
VERIFIED: 'OTA Sync' button visible with sync functionality
VERIFIED: '14 Gün' selector shows 7/14/30 day options
VERIFIED: 'Genel Bakış' button opens find room dialog
VERIFIED: '+ Rezervasyon ekle' button (orange) opens Quick Booking dialog
VERIFIED: Turkish date format display (e.g., '18 Mar – 31 Mar 2026')
VERIFIED: Turkish day names in headers (Çar, Per, Cum, Cts, Paz, Pts, Sal) - line 1196
VERIFIED: Room type headers with amber/yellow background (bg-amber-50) showing price (350 ₺) and occupancy (0/4)
VERIFIED: Room numbers with green indicator dots (w-2 h-2 rounded-full)
VERIFIED: Legend bar with source labels: Expedia, Tatilbudur/Online, Booking.com, Kesin, Müsait, Dolu
VERIFIED: Calendar navigation works (prev/next buttons update date range)
VERIFIED: New booking dialog opens with Room, Guest, Check-in/out, Adults, Children, Total Amount, Status fields
VERIFIED: Occupancy chart section shows 'Doluluk' label with line-style SVG chart
VERIFIED: Weekend columns (Cts/Paz) have orange-50 background tint - line 1981, 2224
VERIFIED: Today's column has blue-50 background tint - line 1981, 2224
VERIFIED: Source-based booking colors implemented (getSourceColor function line 1215): Expedia=orange, Tatilbudur=blue, Kesin=dark
VERIFIED: Thin borders (1px) with 8px border-radius on calendar grid
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar visual redesign verified. All styling matches PMS reference: orange 'Rezervasyonlar' tab, Turkish formatting throughout, amber room type headers with price/occupancy, source-based booking colors (Expedia orange, Tatilbudur blue, Kesin dark), weekend column orange tint, today column blue tint, line-style occupancy chart with 'Doluluk' label. No booking bars visible in current date range due to empty demo data - this is expected behavior.

calendar_loads.details: Page loads correctly after login, all elements render

header_buttons.details: All 7 header buttons visible: Rezervasyonlar (orange), nav arrows, Tarihe git, OTA Sync, 14 Gün selector, Genel Bakış, + Rezervasyon ekle (orange)

turkish_date_format.details: Date range displays as '18 Mar – 31 Mar 2026' in Turkish format

turkish_day_names.details: Headers show Çar, Per, Cum, Cts, Paz, Pts, Sal with date numbers

room_type_headers.details: 6 room types (Suite, Deluxe, Superior, Standard, Family, Junior Suite) with amber bg, price (e.g., 350 ₺), and occupancy (0/4)

room_numbers_indicators.details: 36 rooms visible with green dot indicators

legend_bar.details: Legend shows: Expedia, Tatilbudur/Online, Booking.com, Kesin, Müsait, Dolu with color dots

calendar_navigation.details: Prev/next buttons navigate date range correctly

new_booking_dialog.details: Quick Booking dialog opens with Room, Guest, Check-in/out, Adults, Children, Total Amount, Status fields

occupancy_chart.details: Shows 'Doluluk' label with SVG line chart and percentage values

weekend_highlighting.details: Cts (Saturday) and Paz (Sunday) columns have orange-50 background

playwright_tests_passed: Calendar page load - all UI elements visible
Turkish date formatting - Mar format verified
Turkish day names - Çar, Per, Cum, Cts, Paz verified
Room type headers - amber styling with price/occupancy
Room indicators - green dots on room rows
Legend bar - 6 source labels with colors
New booking dialog - Quick Booking form opens
Weekend highlighting - orange-50 on Cts/Paz columns
Today highlighting - blue-50 on today column
